mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz (name,room,begin_date,end_date,master_id,create_time,update_time,master_name,status,subject) VALUES (#{name},#{room},#{beginDate},#{endDate},#{masterId},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{masterName},#{status}, CASE #{subject} WHEN '1' THEN 'Java' WHEN '2' THEN '前端' WHEN '3' THEN '大数据' WHEN '4' THEN 'Python' WHEN '5' THEN 'GO' WHEN '6' THEN '嵌入式' ELSE #{subject} END)
mapper.update:
UPDATE clazz
name = #{name}, room = #{room}, begin_date = #{beginDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, master_id = #{masterId}, status = #{status},
subject = CASE #{subject} WHEN '1' THEN 'Java' WHEN '2' THEN '前端' WHEN '3' THEN '大数据' WHEN '4' THEN 'Python' WHEN '5' THEN 'GO' WHEN '6' THEN '嵌入式' ELSE #{subject} END,
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name AS master_name,
CASE WHEN CURDATE() < c.begin_date THEN '未开班' WHEN CURDATE() BETWEEN c.begin_date AND c.end_date THEN '已开班' WHEN CURDATE() > c.end_date THEN '已结课' ELSE '未开班' END AS status, c.subject FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.begin_date BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM clazz WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, create_time, update_time, master_name, status, subject FROM clazz WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, create_time, update_time, master_name, status, subject FROM clazz
